name: Central Plaza
description: Open public space at the village core with the grand hero statue as its centerpiece.
visualDescription: Square stone-paved area with a tall carved stone statue

interactions.name: Admire Hero Statue
interactions.description: Stand in front of the statue and look at the hero's carved likeness.

name: Blacksmith's Forge
description: West-side workshop where the blacksmith once forged the hero's legendary sword, now makes household cutlery.
visualDescription: Rectangular stone building with a smoke vent on the roof

interactions.name: Browse Handmade Spoons
interactions.description: Look at the neatly stacked, well-crafted spoons the blacksmith has made.

name: Healer's Cottage
description: East-side small cottage where the healer once treated wounded adventurers, now sits mostly unused.
visualDescription: Rectangular thatched-roof cottage with herb planters outside

interactions.name: Browse Herb Shelves
interactions.description: Look at the neatly arranged dried medicinal herbs on the shelves.
